mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, p.name AS name, p.role AS role, p.bio AS bio, p.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, COUNT(pr.id) AS projectCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN projects pr ON pr.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, p.name, p.role, p.bio, p.avatar_url ORDER BY u.created_at ASC
